allow: PowerShell($tools = "python","py","pip","docker","terraform","aws","git","duckdb"; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$t : $\($c.Source\)" } else { "$t : ABSENT" } }; "----- versions -----"; try { "python: " + \(python --version 2>&1\) } catch {}; try { "pip: " + \(pip --version 2>&1\) } catch {})

PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sys; sys.argv=['x']; from api.app import top_zones, tips, predictions, ml_metrics; import json; print\('TOP ZONES:'\); print\(json.dumps\(top_zones\(3\), indent=2, default=str\)\); print\('TIPS \(1\):'\); print\(json.dumps\(tips\(\)[:1], indent=2, default=str\)\); print\('ML METRICS:'\); m=ml_metrics\(\); print\('R2=', m['model_metrics']['r2'], 'gain%=', m['improvement_mae_pct'], 'top feat=', list\(m['feature_importance'].items\(\)\)[0]\)")
